title: Log in to access the dashboard
description: A returning user can enter valid credentials and reach the authenticated dashboard after signing in.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user is redirected into the authenticated dashboard
Verify dashboard content is displayed

title: Review dashboard overview KPIs after login
description: This test verifies that a returning user can log in and view the consolidated dashboard overview metrics after authentication.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/overview
Verify dashboard KPI cards are displayed
Verify consolidated revenue data is displayed

title: View dashboard overview after login
description: Verifies that a returning user can log in and land on the dashboard overview with consolidated KPI data visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/overview
Verify the dashboard overview is displayed
Verify consolidated KPI data is displayed

title: Open dashboard overview after signing in
description: An authenticated user can land on the overview page and review consolidated KPI summaries and PayPal balance information.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the overview navigation link
Verify KPI summary data is displayed
Verify PayPal balance data is displayed

title: Create an account from the public signup flow
description: This test verifies that a visitor can complete signup from the public site and land inside the authenticated dashboard afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the registration form with valid user details
Submit the signup form
Verify the authenticated dashboard is displayed

title: Start signup from the marketing site
description: A visitor can move from the homepage to sign up and reach the authenticated area after creating an account.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the signup link
Fill in the email field with a new valid email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify the user is redirected into the authenticated dashboard
Verify dashboard content is displayed

title: Connect and disconnect integrations
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can manage supported integrations from the integrations settings tab.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/settings
Switch to the Integrations tab
Connect a supported bank or payment integration
Disconnect the connected integration
Verify the integration connection state is shown
Verify the integration can be disconnected from settings

title: Access settings and manage integrations from the dashboard
description: An authenticated user can open settings, review integrations, and verify the integration management area is available.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the settings navigation link
Open the integrations tab
Verify integration management controls are displayed
Verify connected provider sections are displayed

title: Connect PayPal Business from settings
description: This test verifies that a user can enter PayPal Business credentials, connect the account, and see PayPal marked as connected in settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/settings
Fill in the PayPal Client ID field with a valid value
Fill in the PayPal Secret field with a valid value
Select Sandbox or Live mode
Test the PayPal connection and connect the account
Verify PayPal is shown as connected in settings

title: View dashboard loading states before data appears
description: An authenticated user can see loading indicators on the overview page while financial data is still being prepared.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the overview navigation link
Verify a dashboard loading state is displayed
Verify financial KPI sections are shown after loading completes

title: Review dashboard revenue and payment summaries
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can view revenue and payment summary widgets on the dashboard overview.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/overview
Verify revenue summary data is displayed
Verify payment balance or provider summary data is displayed

title: Connect a bank account from settings
description: This test verifies that a user can open the bank connection flow, complete the connection process, and see the linked bank reflected in settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/settings
Open the bank connection flow
Select a financial institution
Enter valid bank credentials
Authorize account access
Verify the connected bank is shown in settings

title: See updated dashboard data after a webhook-driven refresh
description: An authenticated user can return to the dashboard after a provider event and see refreshed financial data reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the overview navigation link
Open the analytics or cash flow view
Verify refreshed financial data is displayed
Verify the updated provider data is reflected across dashboard sections

title: Retry a dashboard section after an in-page error
description: An authenticated user can retry a failed overview section and see the KPI data update afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the overview navigation link
Verify an error state is visible in a dashboard section
Click the retry control for the failed section
Verify KPI data is displayed in that section

title: Sign up and reach the authenticated app
description: Verifies that a visitor can sign up successfully and enter the authenticated dashboard experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the signup form with valid new user details
Submit the signup form
Verify the user is taken into the authenticated dashboard
Verify dashboard content is displayed

title: Sync PayPal data and see refreshed dashboard metrics
description: This test verifies that triggering a PayPal sync updates the connected account data and the dashboard reflects refreshed PayPal metrics afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/settings
Fill in the PayPal Client ID field with a valid value
Fill in the PayPal Secret field with a valid value
Select Sandbox or Live mode
Test the PayPal connection and connect the account
Trigger a PayPal sync
Navigate to /dashboard/overview
Verify refreshed PayPal financial metrics are displayed

title: Switch between analytics views and review provider data
description: An authenticated user can move across analytics tabs and inspect the different provider views on the analytics page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the analytics navigation link
Switch to the Core analytics tab
Switch to the Lemon Squeezy analytics tab
Switch to the PayPal analytics tab
Verify provider-specific analytics content is displayed
Verify analytics charts or tables are displayed

title: View cash flow summaries across providers
description: An authenticated user can open cash flow and inspect the revenue and provider cash flow sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the cash flow navigation link
Verify MRR cash flow data is displayed

title: Review core analytics charts

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/analytics
Verify the core analytics charts are displayed
Verify revenue and transaction performance data are displayed

title: Switch between analytics tabs and inspect PayPal data

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/analytics
Switch to the Core analytics tab
Switch to the Lemon Squeezy analytics tab
Switch to the PayPal analytics tab

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}

Submit the login form

title: Review cash flow metrics

title: Update profile or workspace settings

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the settings navigation link
Open the profile or workspace tab
Change a profile or workspace field to a valid new value
Save the changes
Verify the updated settings are displayed
Verify a save confirmation is visible

title: Review cash flow views across providers
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can open the cash flow area and review cash flow sections for the supported providers.

title: Switch between analytics tabs
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can switch between Core, Lemon Squeezy, and PayPal analytics views and see each tab's content.

Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/analytics
Switch to the Lemon Squeezy analytics tab
Switch to the PayPal analytics tab
Switch back to the Core analytics tab
Verify all three analytics views are available
Verify each tab shows its own analytics content

title: Review PayPal analytics transactions and invoices

Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/analytics
Switch to the PayPal analytics tab
Go to the next page of transactions
Go to the previous page of transactions
Verify PayPal transaction rows are displayed
Verify transaction pagination controls are available

Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/settings

Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/analytics
Switch to the PayPal analytics tab
Go to the next page of the transactions table
Verify a different page of transaction data is displayed
Verify the transactions table remains visible

title: Disconnect a linked PayPal account
description: This test verifies that a connected PayPal account can be disconnected from settings and is no longer shown as linked.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/settings
Fill in the PayPal Client ID field with a valid value
Fill in the PayPal Secret field with a valid value
Select Sandbox or Live mode
Test the PayPal connection and connect the account
Disconnect the PayPal account
Verify the PayPal connection is removed from settings

title: Browse the homepage hero and supporting sections
description: A visitor can review the homepage hero, social proof, features, testimonials, and pricing information on the marketing site.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the hero section is displayed
Scroll to the logos section
Verify a social proof logos section is displayed
Scroll to the features section
Verify the features section is displayed
Scroll to the testimonials section
Verify the testimonials section is displayed
Scroll to the pricing comparison section
Verify a pricing comparison table is displayed

title: Disconnect a linked bank account
description: This test verifies that a connected bank account can be disconnected from settings and is no longer shown as linked.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/settings
Open the bank connection flow
Select a financial institution
Enter valid bank credentials
Authorize account access
Disconnect the bank account

Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/settings
Switch to the Notifications tab
Toggle a notification preference
Save the notification changes

title: Review pricing before signup
description: Verifies that a visitor can open the pricing page and inspect the available plan information before registering.

steps.description: Navigate to /pricing
Verify pricing plan information is displayed
Verify checkout or signup conversion options are displayed

title: Browse the marketing homepage and pricing path
description: This test verifies that a visitor can browse the marketing homepage, review pricing information, and reach the signup page from the public site.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to view the features and testimonials sections
Scroll to view the pricing table
Click the link to view pricing
Click the link to start signup
Verify the pricing information is displayed
Verify the signup page is displayed

title: Disconnect a connected provider from settings
description: An authenticated user can disconnect an integration from settings and see it removed from the connected state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the settings navigation link
Open the integrations tab
Disconnect one connected provider using the UI
Verify the provider is shown as disconnected
Verify the integration management controls remain available

title: Explore marketing homepage content
description: Verifies that a visitor can browse the marketing homepage and review the main value proposition and supporting sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the homepage hero content is displayed
Verify feature, testimonial, and pricing information are displayed

title: Reject invalid login credentials
description: This test verifies that an unauthenticated visitor who submits invalid credentials remains on the login page and sees a validation problem.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with invalid values
Submit the login form
Verify a login validation error is visible
Verify the login page remains visible

title: Show login validation for invalid credentials
description: A user entering invalid credentials sees an authentication error and remains on the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with a fake email address
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Submit the login form
Verify an authentication error message is displayed
Verify the login form remains visible

title: Handle invalid login input
description: Verifies that invalid login credentials are rejected and the user remains on the login form.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with invalid values
Submit the login form
Verify a login validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the login screen

title: Cancel the bank connection flow without linking an account
description: This test verifies that canceling the Plaid connection flow returns the user to settings without creating a linked bank account.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/settings
Open the bank connection flow
Cancel the bank connection flow
Verify no bank account is connected in settings
